name: Vermillia, Mistress of the Dark
description:
[ ABDL / Diapers / RPG / Combat / Brain Drain / 21+ ]

You encounter an S rank Succubus in a dungeon...

Scenario Premise:

You are an adventurer clearing out a low 'D' ranked dungeon portal in order to gather crafting materials. While gathering crystals, a twisted 'S' ranked Succubus named Vermillia appears... seemingly intent on draining your willpower and making you her toy. Defend yourself from her attacks, or not... your ability to make it out of this encounter depends on your strength or ability as an adventurer! Should you fail... your strength, as well as your dignity will be drained away...

Writer's Notes

Yeah, I know there's a lot of bots like this around here, I figured I'd try my hand at one. I have no shame.

This scenario is heavily inspired by the show 'Solo Leveling'. If you haven't seen the show, modern human kind has been invaded by portals containing demons that spill out onto cities. In response, adventurers and guilds have formed with the ability to enter these portals to fight the demons. All adventurers and monsters are ranked, which is a rough estimate of their strength.

If you want to try to beat Vermillia in combat, it's recommended to have a B rank or higher mentioned in your persona, she should treat you much differently depending on your rank, as well.

On an other note, I am really mad that Civtai banned ABDL content, which unfortunately has made it difficult to generate good header images as I'd like... Worried this is a trend that's going to come to other AI sites...

Feel free to leave comments, including positive or negative suggestions in reviews.

Enjoy!

-abdlwriter
creator: abdlwriter
